movie.overview: Bullied at school and ignored and abused at home by his indifferent mother and older brother, Billy Casper, a 15-year-old working-class Yorkshire boy, tames and trains his pet kestrel falcon whom he names Kes. Helped and encouraged by his English teacher and his fellow students, Billy finally finds a positive purpose to his unhappy existence.
movie.tagline: They beat him. They deprived him. They ridiculed him. They broke his heart. But they couldn’t break his spirit.
movie.title: Kes
